summary: All 6 features tested and passing: Homepage experts section loads real experts from API (31 experts available), expert cards show photos and real names from database, 'View Profile' button navigates to /experts/:expertId (individual profile), Public Remedies page loads 15 remedies from /api/remedies/catalog API with real prices (Chakra Balance ₹3,500 confirmed), Public Topics page shows categories from /api/admin/public/homepage-data (Love & Relationships, Career & Money, Health & Wellness, Fertility & Family Planning).

✓ Expert cards display real photos (randomuser.me images) and names from database
✓ 'View Profile' button on homepage navigates to /experts/:expertId (e.g., /experts/exp_001)
✓ Remedies show real prices from backend REMEDIES_CATALOG (Chakra Balance ₹3,500)
✓ All data is now from API - no longer HARDCODED/MOCKED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All public pages are now connected to backend APIs: Homepage experts from /api/simplified/experts/all (31 experts), Remedies from /api/remedies/catalog (15 remedies), Topics from /api/admin/public/homepage-data (4 categories). All previously hardcoded/mocked data has been replaced with real API data.
